name: Nina Ahmad
subject: thoughts and prayers are not enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/vFehj_fNQqaJ54cFgSvQ3Aapuec1fbII4GxvZ7LearA=?am=10&recipientId=GYKgujd1qXAheZskgLys31&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)
---
Friends, **America is facing a public health epidemic** \-- gun violence deaths**.** According to the Brady Campaign, **more than 90 people die from gun violence in our country every day** , and even more are injured. That number is too high. Countless lives have been lost. **We must DEMAND that our elected officials take action here in Pennsylvania, and in Washington DC.** [**Will you join me and fellow Democrats in calling to REPEAL the Dickey amendment? **](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/HvUBZm8g_VKVXt9Fj8mFdirRST2bwwKNzfVjjE7E3XQ=?source=ahmad&redirect_url=http://sign.actiontaker.org/314-repeal-dickey-ahmad-ab) Thoughts and prayers are not enough. We need research, and then we must take action to make safer public policy -- especially in Harrisburg at the State Capitol. **As Lieutenant Governor, I 'll lead the way on gun violence prevention and keeping Pennsylvanians safe. ** In the meantime, calling for a repeal of the Dickey Amendment is a no-nonsense, bipartisan step that we can all take towards a new reality of safer schools, safer streets, and safer communities. [**PLEASE join me in taking action. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/HvUBZm8g_VKVXt9Fj8mFdirRST2bwwKNzfVjjE7E3XQ=?source=ahmad&redirect_url=http://sign.actiontaker.org/314-repeal-dickey-ahmad-ab) Our lives depend on it. -Nina ~~~~~~~~~ Original Message ~~~~~~~~~ Friends, It seems like every few days, there's news of of another mass shooting in America. Gun violence has become our new normal, and countless lives are lost because of it. **We can 't let that normalcy dull our senses, and stop us from working harder every day to eradicate our gun violence epidemic.** When these horrific shootings occur, I ask myself, "what do we do now?"** Clearly, thoughts and prayers aren't solving anything. As a scientist - I know we need evidence-based gun policy reform in America.** However, since 1996 with the backing of the NRA, **Congress has banned the Center for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) from conducting the necessary public health research on our gun violence epidemic. ** **[How can we solve a problem if we can't fully research solutions in the first place? That's why we need to repeal this unacceptable amendment](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/HvUBZm8g_VKVXt9Fj8mFdirRST2bwwKNzfVjjE7E3XQ=?source=ahmad&redirect_url=http://sign.actiontaker.org/314-repeal-dickey-ahmad-ab).** After the Parkland shooting, we have seen a few positive changes happen in the way we're discussing gun violence as a country. And I want use our campaign as a vehicle to keep that momentum going. **[Calling on Congress to repeal the Dickey Amendment is a basic and obvious first step in addressing gun violence. Will you join me in adding your name to our letter?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/HvUBZm8g_VKVXt9Fj8mFdirRST2bwwKNzfVjjE7E3XQ=?source=ahmad&redirect_url=http://sign.actiontaker.org/314-repeal-dickey-ahmad-ab)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/HvUBZm8g_VKVXt9Fj8mFdirRST2bwwKNzfVjjE7E3XQ=?source=ahmad&redirect_url=http://sign.actiontaker.org/314-repeal-dickey-ahmad-ab) With complicit Republicans, the NRA tries to keep Americans in the dark about the true impact of gun violence in America, and often succeeds. **It 's past time for the research to be done**, and it's past time for action to be taken by our lawmakers at all levels. **What 's happened since Parkland has been a tiny measure of success, but we have so much work left to do. ** [**Join me in demanding Congress let the CDC do their job and research this public health epidemic, by repealing the Dickey Amendment. This is a no-nonsense, bipartisan step that Congress can take immediately.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/HvUBZm8g_VKVXt9Fj8mFdirRST2bwwKNzfVjjE7E3XQ=?source=ahmad&redirect_url=http://sign.actiontaker.org/314-repeal-dickey-ahmad-ab) In the wake of the Parkland, **now is the right time to "politicize" gun violence**, and to take the first step of**repealing the Dickey Amendment.** **Together, we need to stand up to the NRA, and [take action](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/HvUBZm8g_VKVXt9Fj8mFdirRST2bwwKNzfVjjE7E3XQ=?source=ahmad&redirect_url=http://sign.actiontaker.org/314-repeal-dickey-ahmad-ab). ** No more lives should be lost to senseless gun violence. **Thank you for joining me in speaking out, ** \-- Nina **_About Dr. Nina Ahmad:_** Nina Ahmad is a first-generation Bangladeshi American, scientist, and former President of the Philadelphia chapter of the National Organization for Women. She is running to bring integrity and accountability to the state house and to be an outspoken progressive voice in Pennsylvania politics.
**[Learn more about Nina>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/JwWyYCESwndAMM0HPiyMF_TApb-FMst8GFy3EsyfRKQ=)** _**Stay in Touch:**_ **[website](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/nMZsE2Ff2CZWKP-D3ZIEsZLTSVbxs0M9MuWdum4SJp0=) | [facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/6aN9fiYAsxy2o5Gg7kCxFWzuWf7m2UmAsJrv3peWZRk=) | [twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/-CqgSz7Bvqo5JlgGWaZabVP9joIFa0bGeKMrqe_baMg=/YVjkoqvnpiORplRoJ0PE25sLOb5bnv3Qtz-nK2ezO5I=)**

name: Tom Perez
subject: CONOR LAMB!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
In a stunning upset victory, Conor Lamb has won the special election in PA-18.
---
Wow, Derek! Conor Lamb has won the special election in Pennsylvania's 18th District!

This is the first House seat we've flipped from red to blue since Donald Trump was elected president -- and this can be the first of many defeats he and Paul Ryan get this year. But you and I both know that Republicans aren't going to take this lying down.

The GOP spent more than _10 million dollars_ to try to defend this seat -- but thanks to strong grassroots support and on-the-ground organizing, Democrats flipped PA-18 from red to blue. Now it's time to scale our grassroots organizing program in all 50 states -- and the only way we'll be successful is if supporters like you help build this organization.

**Chip in $3 right now if you're ready to elect Democrats nationwide this year. We can take back the House in November -- but only with your help.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522646/4067b0a/50a9cdc9c/7e49874f/900194691/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/congrats-conor?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180313_tp_nd&source=em_20180313_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180313_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522646/4067b0a/50a9cdc9c/7e49874c/900194691/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/congrats-conor?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180313_tp_nd&source=em_20180313_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180313_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522646/4067b0a/50a9cdc9c/7e49874d/900194691/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/congrats-conor?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180313_tp_nd&source=em_20180313_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180313_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522646/4067b0a/50a9cdc9c/7e49874a/900194691/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/congrats-conor?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180313_tp_nd&source=em_20180313_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180313_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522646/4067b0a/50a9cdc9c/7e49874b/900194691/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/congrats-conor?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180313_tp_nd&source=em_20180313_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180313_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522646/4067b0a/50a9cdc9c/7e498748/900194691/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/congrats-conor?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180313_tp_nd&source=em_20180313_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180313_tp_nd")
** Together, we are proving that we have the people, we have the candidates, and we have the momentum. Now it's just a matter of having the resources to mobilize Democrats in all 435 congressional districts and get them to the polls.

With Republicans pocketing big checks from millionaires and billionaires who are spending absurd amounts of money to stop us, it's critical that all of us step up to help more Democrats compete and win in all 50 states.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 right now so Democrats can organize nationwide? Your contribution will help make more victories like Conor Lamb's possible in November.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522646/4067b0a/50a9cdc9c/7e498749/900194691/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/congrats-conor?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+chip+in++if+consin&utm_campaign=em_20180313_tp_nd&source=em_20180313_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180313_tp_nd")**

Thanks for all of your support, and congratulations to Conor on last night's big victory!

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

name: Katie McGinty
subject: 200th time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friend,

Yesterday, my good friend Sheldon Whitehouse made his 200th floor speech urging his colleagues to take bipartisan action on climate change now.

The world's leading science academies and our own national security community all agree: Burning fossil fuels presents catastrophic risks to our climate, and it's long past time to get serious about clean energy.

Having spent my whole career fighting to protect our environment, I want to support Sheldon in his mission to raise the alarm before it's too late.

Please join me and support Sheldon. He is up for reelection this November and needs our support to continue to stand up for our planet. You can give directly to his campaign at this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/whitehouse-200](https://act.myngp.com/el/gXeBKDVK8TPN4b6zciKZeQ==/cIkZ0FAv9plVMj9Il-wi9Q==)**

The future of our planet should be something that brings us all together. The air we breathe has no party, and we all want a healthy planet for our kids and grandkids. There was a time when Republicans did join Democrats in pushing for climate action. The window of opportunity to turn things around is closing -- and Sheldon isn't about to let Donald Trump slam it shut.

name: The White House
subject: What to know about sanctuary cities
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=89badc418a8843fce4531ff7d2f68f0c83ab4e03f6c82592aec6d33f31ad8ad62087afd70a9264a74cf752f672343205044f58c6211b93c1

What to know about sanctuary cities

During President Donald J. Trump’s visit to California yesterday to examine prototypes for a border wall with Mexico, he explained the danger of “sanctuary cities” that refuse to cooperate with lawful Federal immigration enforcement.

“California’s sanctuary policies are illegal and unconstitutional and put the safety and security of our entire nation at risk,” the President tweeted. “Thousands of dangerous & violent criminal aliens are released as a result of sanctuary policies.”

A few important facts about sanctuary cities:

- When sanctuary city officials warn illegal aliens about possible upcoming enforcement activities, they allow criminals to prepare themselves—and thus endanger innocent bystanders.
- Sanctuary policies in California have allowed the release of numerous criminals charged with serious crimes who could continue to harm communities.
- If Immigration and Customs Enforcement officials cannot arrest criminals in the controlled environments of police stations or jails, they must perform these duties in workplaces, in residences, or on the streets.

Learn more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=89badc418a8843fc6d83d185d4965229f2ca01ca703363ae9b72b644adbca49e995c538205b881ce17b3f70affd83856b2711bbb6c9457b3
What you need to know about sanctuary cities.

Go deeper:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=89badc418a8843fc3cee8405cd5b45b5866c78683a41a7a9f0b7f74d511b4535815e6c2784794d57911e16356b56b2125063750597ae792e
How the Trump Administration is working to build stronger borders.

Why cutting taxes is good for American workers

This afternoon, President Trump will pay a visit to St. Louis, Missouri, to tour a Boeing manufacturing plant before joining a roundtable with workers and executives from 10 Missouri companies. U.S. Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin will also participate in the discussion.

Boeing offers just one of hundreds of examples of business tax reform paying off for America’s workers. After President Trump signed the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act into law in December, the company announced it would invest about $600 million in its employees.

The Council of Economic Advisers recently explained why tax cuts have been so important for the U.S. economy: “Under the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, the shift away from worldwide taxation toward a territorial system ends the penalty on companies headquartered in the United States.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=89badc418a8843fcd44cc0aef04c68ae7fce27b68f1657db2e72d2b4a0001e07bd951b1875ad5d39a3d4cf153f115c7f51a6d3bf3aa7a6c5
Learn more about the economics behind cutting taxes for American workers.

Human trafficking is an affront to human dignity

With millions affected worldwide, human trafficking is a global atrocity that deprives millions of their universal human rights. President Trump is taking a stand to stop it in its tracks.

“My Administration will focus on ending the absolutely horrific practice of human trafficking,” the President said. “And I am prepared to bring the full force and weight of our government, whatever we can do, in order to solve this horrific problem.”

This month, President Trump appointed nine human trafficking survivors to serve on the U.S. Advisory Council on Human Trafficking. And in light of the impending Senate vote on H.R. 1865—the FOSTA-SESTA legislative package designed to fight online sex trafficking—the Administration hosted a roundtable on human trafficking to discuss the path forward on this crucial issue.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=89badc418a8843fc9b42c794cebad59164ebf70d38813f325375cf76e19077a1c08ae188c194695a040905c7ce1eb59d8b76c4a57b628420
See more ways the Administration is working to end the practice of human trafficking.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump at Joint Base Andrews | March 13, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will travel to St. Louis, Missouri, where he will tour the Boeing Company. The President will then participate in a roundtable discussion about tax cuts and tax reform.

This afternoon, Vice President Mike Pence participates in a swearing-in ceremony for Russ Vought as the Deputy Director of the Office of Management and Budget.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=89badc418a8843fc11ba08a44910ca942ac7380ac104b8e42d32b74f3138901dc8010f74c45d93eacc0bcd7bd8ea4aa1014d562a42e4fbfb
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=89badc418a8843fc93297f6ac2093a7695a04df45d2aa259420ea67a8d71493259108d574d11f1dd854da3ce67ef79bae71d09ade48a586d
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4016898ec42fe67ed6c5d1763e9130c594b3d54717dc8e5a1d5bce5a9d90082a80f6efd73be8d0b1866b2c323904de5b2f651c39cf1525ef0

Great news, as you've probably heard: Conor Lamb won the special election to become the next member of Congress from Pennsylvania. I couldn't be prouder of the campaign that Conor ran or happier for the Southwestern Pennsylvanians who are going to benefit from his experience and dedication.

National Republicans went all-in against him, spending _over $10 million dollars_ on TV and radio ads alone over the course of this campaign. Thanks to generous donors, Conor was able to push back, and he made sure that Pennsylvanians knew who he was and what he stood for.

**You 're going to hear a lot of people tell you that Conor's win means good things for Democrats like me, but that's only true if -- like Conor -- I have the resources to push back against the Republican money that's already pouring into the state to support my opponent.**

Just this weekend, President Trump praised my opponent and said that he'll personally "be out fighting for him very, very hard." His Super PAC has already promised to spend $100 million to defeat Democrats like me, and Republicans have been stepping up their attacks against me ever since I voted against the GOP's tax scheme.

Friend --

It's been more than a year since Donald Trump appointed Betsy DeVos to be Secretary of Education.

Since then, she's rolled back protections for LGBTQ students and sexual assault survivors. And she's tried to gut funding for public education.

_That 's why education experts give Betsy DeVos an 'F!'_

Betsy DeVos's actions are harming our children, not helping them. That's why we want to hear what you think about Betsy DeVos.
**[So let us know, do you approve of Betsy DeVos?](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf9f/73a2bc12/3fcc4668/1fccfe0d/3328727157/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/poll-devos?utm_campaign=em18_180314_betsy_clk_clq_act_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180314_betsy_clk_clq_act_pol_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_content=5+-+FIRSTNAMESo+let+us+know+do+you+approve+o")**

Since day one in office, Governor Wolf has fought to help kids get a good education.

He restored the previous administration's $1 billion cut to public education, and launched Pennsylvania to second in the nation in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics education.

Governor Wolf knows that investing in our children is essential. But Betsy DeVos seems to disagree.

**[So listen, we need to hear from you. Do you approve of Betsy DeVos?](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf9f/73a2bc12/3fcc4668/1fccfe33/3328727157/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/poll-devos?utm_campaign=em18_180314_betsy_clk_clq_act_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180314_betsy_clk_clq_act_pol_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_content=7+-+So+FIRSTNAMElisten+we+need+to+hear+from+")**

clean_body: I've enjoyed meeting new faces and helping share our hope to finally bring an end to Washington dysfunction. Every stop on our tour has been a...... Friend, We've been out touring Wisconsin to win the support of grassroots voters and friend, it's been great! I've enjoyed meeting new faces and helping share our hope to finally bring an end to Washington dysfunction. Every stop on our tour has been a reminder that D.C. could use more of our Wisconsin way! Just this week, we crossed 50,000 miles. There's just one little hitch... The gas bill is starting to add up. So, I’m reaching out for help. As we get further and further along, it’s more important than ever that we build our support throughout Wisconsin. That means this tour MUST go on. If everyone getting this email can chip in just $5, we'll be able to fill up the whole tank and share our message with hundreds of more Wisconsinites! I really appreciate your support, friend. You've heard it before but I’ll say it again: it's grassroots support that’ll add up to make all the difference in our race. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: NHGOP Press & Communications
subject: Forrester statement on Colin Van Ostern's Next Political Move
body:
**Forrester statement on Colin Van Ostern's Next Political Move**
**For Immediate Release:** March 14, 2018**Contact:** Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310
CONCORD - NHGOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding Colin Van Ostern's next political move:
"When Colin Van Ostern announced he wasn’t running for Governor, we all assumed he had something cynical and self-serving up his sleeve. No one imagined it would be this cynical and this self-serving. It would be a complete disaster to have a professional political operative who is literally trying to buy the office of Secretary of State. New Hampshire would lose our First-in-the-Nation prestige and our election integrity would be at risk with a political hack as Secretary of State. To maintain election integrity, we must reject Colin Van Ostern’s cynical ploy." ###

name: Yasmine Taeb via DNC HQ
subject: We have failed, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Today at 10 a.m. students across the nation walked out of their classrooms for 17 minutes.
---
Today at 10 a.m. students across the nation walked out of their classrooms for 17 minutes. They did it in remembrance of the 17 innocent lives that we lost at Stoneman Douglas and to call for gun legislation that will make us all safer.

As a high school student, I once walked the halls and sat in the classrooms at Stoneman Douglas. Aaron Feis, the assistant football coach who was killed while protecting students, was a friend of mine. He died the same way he lived -- a selfless hero. He used his body as a shield and threw himself in front of students as bullets hailed down.

With today's walkout, we not only honor those who were lost -- we also come together with new resolve to end these tragedies once and for all.

I will not allow my high school to simply become another statistic, and Stoneman Douglas students are leading the fight to ensure that it does not.

**Today I hope you will stand with them. Add your name to demand Congress pass common-sense gun legislation to keep us all safe from gun violence.**

**[ SIGN THE PETITION](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052266d/4067b0a/5090bde3b/7e486d2c/1743611499/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/congress-gun-violence?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+THE+PETITION&utm_campaign=em_20180314_yt_nd&source=em_20180314_yt_nd&refcode=em_20180314_yt_nd")
** Too many politicians act as if these shootings are just a fact of everyday life -- as if there's nothing we could have done to stop the massacre at my high school and nothing we can do to prevent the next one.

**We must not accept that we are too powerless to make progress, or that the NRA is too powerful to defeat.**

The courage of students across the country who took action during the walkout today will outlast the cruel indifference of the NRA. It will outlast the cowardice of Republican congressional leaders who refuse to bring any meaningful legislation to the floor.

Whether or not you have a personal connection to Stoneman Douglas, it's clear that we have failed our students, our teachers, and our country. We cannot let another massacre like this happen, Derek -- and right now it's up to us to demand change.

**[Stand in solidarity with students across the country today by adding your name to demand Congress pass legislation to keep us safe from gun violence.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052266d/4067b0a/5090bde3b/7e486de1/1743611499/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/congress-gun-violence?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Stand+in+solidarity+with+students+across&utm_campaign=em_20180314_yt_nd&source=em_20180314_yt_nd&refcode=em_20180314_yt_nd")**

Thanks for taking a stand against gun violence.

Yasmine

Yasmine Taeb
Stoneman Douglas Alumna
DNC Member

P.S. -- Last week Florida's GOP-controlled state legislature and governor signed new gun restrictions into law. But they also provided funding to help train and arm school staff members. The only way to actually make us safer from gun violence is by voting Republicans out, and in the meantime we have to put pressure on our elected representatives. **[Add your name to demand Congress take action on gun violence.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052266d/4067b0a/5090bde3b/7e486dee/1743611499/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/congress-gun-violence?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+to+demand+Congress+take+ac&utm_campaign=em_20180314_yt_nd&source=em_20180314_yt_nd&refcode=em_20180314_yt_nd")**

name: Randy Bryce
subject: Make Paul Ryan do the right thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Randy Bryce for Congress
body:
Hello,

After 17 children and educators were murdered with an assault rifle last month, Paul Ryan said that we shouldn't "rush" to have a conversation about guns.

Now, this wasn't out of respect for the families of the victims or even because Ryan was concerned with protecting "the rights of law-abiding citizens," as he said. Ryan didn't want to rush the conversation about gun control because he was looking out for the special interest group that gave him nearly $200,000 in a single year -- the NRA.

I don't know about you, but I'm sick and tired of the people who promise to work for us going to D.C. and doing the complete opposite. It's about time Ryan and the rest of his Republican allies in Congress do their jobs and work for the people, not the NRA.

**[If you agree, join me and other elected officials across the country in telling Republican leaders to reject the NRA's money.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8qsJii6enT18Hvjpu0Kp_A==/vrZ7ldxXLa5Nlk4MgfT7HA==)**

The NRA has gone too far (again). They're rejecting common-sense gun safety legislation and pushing a dystopian view of our country that encourages people to arm themselves with weapons of war.

But as a veteran, I know what an assault weapon does to the body -- and there's no reason for anyone other than a member of the military to be holding one. It's not worth the risk to our kids, or to the cops charged with keeping our neighborhoods safe, like my dad was.

We can't assume Ryan will suddenly do the right thing now. After all, he's helped make gun lobbyists like the NRA so rich that they've donated more to his campaign than any other U.S. Representative.

**[So we need to stand together and demand our Republican leaders do the right thing and reject the NRA's money. Add your name now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8qsJii6enT18Hvjpu0Kp_A==/vrZ7ldxXLa5Nlk4MgfT7HA==)**

Thank you,

Randy Bryce

Ben

Governor Eric Holcomb just unveiled his bracket, and he picked the Purdue Boilermakers to take it all the way and to bring the national... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=95908d545d)
---
| |
---

All --

Governor Eric Holcomb just unveiled his bracket, and he picked the Purdue Boilermakers to bring the national championship home to Indiana. [Watch his big bracket unveiling](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aae9b03ec4&e=1acd9bb3d6) with Pacers player (and Northwest Indiana native!) Glenn Robinson III, or [check out the picture here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=16f6cda470&e=1acd9bb3d6) to see his full picks!

Do you think your bracket can get further than Governor Holcomb's? **[Join our Beat the Governor bracket challenge to find out!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=604df8cca9&e=1acd9bb3d6)**
[Add your bracket to the challenge](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ab0a80da47&e=1acd9bb3d6), and make sure to get it in before games begin tomorrow. We've got some fun prizes for the top-finishing brackets, and I don't want you to miss out!

-Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

P.S. I filled out a bracket, too, and will be following along to see how everyone's doing. [I'd love to see your name on the list! ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b89ac3afcf&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**From:** Indiana Republican Party <info@indiana.gop>

**Subject:** Beat Governor Holcomb (with your bracket)
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6eb4ffcfa6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| It's March in Indiana, and you know what that means. Get your brackets ready, because it's time to **Beat the Governor** with [a spirited bracket challenge](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=74ce821197&e=1acd9bb3d6) as part of the 2018 NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament!

**Join in on the fun, and** **see how your bracket stacks up with picks from Governor Eric Holcomb, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer, and other Republican leaders from across the state! **
[**\-- > Click here to join the Beat the Governor bracket challenge!! <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f622e5b795&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Governor Holcomb will fill out his bracket later this week, but you can lock in your selections now. Where will you place the Indiana schools in the bracket? Will Purdue face off with Butler? Which team will advance? The choice is yours.

The top-placing brackets in this year's Indiana GOP Bracket Challenge will receive must-have prizes, including:
_**First Place**_
Two tickets to the 2018 Indiana Republican Spring Dinner

_**Second Place**_
A basketball signed by Governor Eric Holcomb

_**Third Place**_
Any item of your choice from the [Indiana GOP store](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0d0deb0c36&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Governor Holcomb may have shot baskets in EVERY Indiana county, but fill out a bracket and see how your picks in this year's tournament match up! Make sure to [submit your bracket](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a84cf7a4ea&e=1acd9bb3d6) before the first game tips-off on Thursday afternoon!

body:
|

---
Friends,

Brave students are making their voices heard, and it's clear they want action on school safety and gun reforms.

I do too.

Today, as kids across the state and nation are remembering the victims of Parkland and demanding changes, I'm outlining meaningful, common sense steps that we can make to better protect our children and our communities.

[**Our kids deserve action. Here are some steps we can take in North Carolina:

We should enact extreme risk protection orders, which can help prevent future tragedies by having courts remove guns from dangerous people.

We should update our school safety plans and make sure they are effective.

We need to strengthen the background check system to make our communities safer and keep guns from violent criminals and the dangerously mentally ill. Our current law has a glaring loophole that allows someone to buy assault weapons without a background check. We need to fix that.

Until the federal government takes action to discontinue the sale of assault weapons to civilians, North Carolina law should be updated to raise the legal age of sale of these weapons to age 21 and require anyone buying them -- at a store, online, or at a gun show -- to go through the same background check and permitting process as they would for a handgun.

If it falls through on a national level, we should take action in North Carolina to ban bump stocks.

Finally, it is clear that there needs to be better diagnosis and treatment of people with mental illness, especially those who might turn violent. For that to happen, mental health care needs to be more accessible.
